/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/llama-app.dir/llama.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/llama-app.dir/__/license.cpp.o" -o ../bin/llama  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iptv-infra/workspace/llamacpp-aos-benchmark/build-host/bin: ../bin/libllama-server-impl.so ../bin/libllama-cli-impl.so ../bin/libllama-completion-impl.so ../bin/libllama-bench-impl.so ../bin/libllama-batched-bench-impl.so ../bin/libllama-fit-params-impl.so ../bin/libllama-quantize-impl.so ../bin/libllama-perplexity-impl.so ../tools/ui/libllama-ui.a ../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../tools/server/libserver-context.a ../bin/libmtmd.so.0.0.9793 ../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9793 ../common/libllama-common-base.a ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9793 ../bin/libggml.so.0.15.2 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.15.2 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2
